creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Thu Mar  7 08:00:10 2013
New Revision: 313568
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/313568

Log:
  - Update to 1.5.3
  
  Changes:        https://github.com/marcinkuzminski/rhodecode/blob/master/docs/changelog.rst
  PR:             ports/176704
  Submitted by:	William Grzybowski <william88@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Added:
  head/www/py-rhodecode/files/patch-setup.py   (contents, props changed)
Deleted:
  head/www/py-rhodecode/files/patch-setup.py.in
Modified:
  head/www/py-rhodecode/Makefile
  head/www/py-rhodecode/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/py-rhodecode/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/www/py-rhodecode/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-rhodecode/Makefile	Thu Mar  7 07:47:55 2013	(r313567)
+++ head/www/py-rhodecode/Makefile	Thu Mar  7 08:00:10 2013	(r313568)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	rhodecode
-PORTVERSION=	1.5.1
+PORTVERSION=	1.5.3
 CATEGORIES=	www devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -17,7 +17,6 @@ BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}Pa
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pylons>=1.0:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-pylons \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}waitress>=0.8.1:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-waitress \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}webob>=1.0.8:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-webob \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}beaker>=1.6.4:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-beaker \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}formencode>=1.2.4:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-formencode \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}webhelpers>=1.3:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-webhelpers \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}mako>=0.7.3:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-mako \

Modified: head/www/py-rhodecode/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-rhodecode/distinfo	Thu Mar  7 07:47:55 2013	(r313567)
+++ head/www/py-rhodecode/distinfo	Thu Mar  7 08:00:10 2013	(r313568)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (RhodeCode-1.5.1.tar.gz) = de47e1a995249069270f0d68a70d2a6a42ef82294f29947c7f30e571634aef77
-SIZE (RhodeCode-1.5.1.tar.gz) = 2436257
+SHA256 (RhodeCode-1.5.3.tar.gz) = 4024a28840bd9b9b2d2e47cdf225349e008745b5282e79af7a7357cb6b94330d
+SIZE (RhodeCode-1.5.3.tar.gz) = 2569673

Added: head/www/py-rhodecode/files/patch-setup.py
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/py-rhodecode/files/patch-setup.py	Thu Mar  7 08:00:10 2013	(r313568)
@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
+diff --git setup.py setup.py
+index 70b6aa5..6f2c869 100644
+--- setup.py
++++ setup.py
+@@ -33,23 +33,23 @@ __platform__ = platform.system()
+ is_windows = __platform__ in _get_meta_var('PLATFORM_WIN', _metadata)
+ 
+ requirements = [
+-    "waitress==0.8.1",
+-    "webob==1.0.8",
+-    "Pylons==1.0.0",
+-    "Beaker==1.6.4",
+-    "WebHelpers==1.3",
+-    "formencode==1.2.4",
+-    "SQLAlchemy==0.7.9",
+-    "Mako==0.7.3",
++    "waitress>=0.8.1",
++    "webob>=1.0.8",
++    "Pylons>=1.0.0",
++    "Beaker>=1.6.4",
++    "WebHelpers>=1.3",
++    "formencode>=1.2.4",
++    "SQLAlchemy>=0.7.9",
++    "Mako>=0.7.3",
+     "pygments>=1.5",
+-    "whoosh>=2.4.0,<2.5",
+-    "celery>=2.2.5,<2.3",
++    "whoosh>=2.4.0",
++    "celery>=2.2.5",
+     "babel",
+-    "python-dateutil>=1.5.0,<2.0.0",
++    "python-dateutil>=1.5.0",
+     "dulwich>=0.8.7,<0.9.0",
+-    "markdown==2.2.1",
+-    "docutils==0.8.1",
+-    "simplejson==2.5.2",
++    "markdown>=2.2.1",
++    "docutils>=0.8.1",
++    "simplejson>=2.5.2",
+     "mock",
+ ]
+ 
+@@ -64,7 +64,7 @@ if is_windows:
+     requirements.append("mercurial==2.4.2")
+ else:
+     requirements.append("py-bcrypt")
+-    requirements.append("mercurial==2.4.2")
++    requirements.append("mercurial>=2.4.2")
+ 
+ 
+ dependency_links = [
